coding_notes: Replicate 3 verdicts. DeepSeek r3 returned to LPS+FFA+urate trio (different from r2's LPS+C5a+mast-cell). Gemini r3 trio = LPS+DAMPs+FFA, but TOP changed from r2's S100A8/A9 back to LPS. OpenAI r3 picked LPS+FFA+cytokines (similar to r1's LPS+FFA+something), top is FFA-TLR2. Anthropic r3 awaiting (currently no file).

claims.claim_text: Mechanism #1 includes gut-derived LPS / endotoxin translocation acting via TLR4 on macrophages.

anthropic.value_quoted: Mechanism 2: alcohol-induced barrier disruption -> LPS TLR4

claims.claim_text: At least one named mechanism involves saturated free fatty acids (FFAs) priming via TLR2 (Joosten 2010 axis).

deepseek.value_quoted: Mechanism 2: FFA palmitate->TLR4/CD36 (NOT Joosten TLR2 explicitly)

claims.claim_text: DAMPs (HMGB1, S100A8/A9, or related) are named as a candidate priming mechanism.

deepseek.value_quoted: Did not list DAMPs; r3 trio = LPS+FFA+urate

openai.value_quoted: Mechanism 3 was cytokine priming (TNF/IL-1) not DAMPs specifically

claims.claim_text: Soluble urate itself is named as a priming-signal candidate.
Top mechanism prioritized for in-vivo test is gut-LPS / TLR4.

openai.value_quoted: For 'rich meal' I would test FFA/TLR2; for alcohol gut LPS

anthropic.value_quoted: Top: FFA/TLR2 (lipid infusion in hyperuricemic mice with TLR2-/- controls)

claims.claim_text: Alternative non-priming explanation: protein-corona / crystal-shedding / bioavailability change of MSU.

deepseek.value_quoted: Crystal-shedding / protein coat stripping during trigger

gemini.value_quoted: ApoE/ApoB protein corona stripping or new uncoated crystal precipitation

openai.value_quoted: Acute crystal-surface/crystal-burden change rather than new signal-1

anthropic.value_quoted: ApoB/ApoE lipoprotein corona shielding loss; same as r1 + r2
